hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_input?.filePath||'';const base=f.split('/').pop();if(['LICENSE','README.md'].includes(base)){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Blocked: '+base+' is a protected file. Confirm with user before modifying.'}));}})"
